PER THE RELIEF REQUESTED IN ITS MOVING PAPERS, KIMBERLY-CLARK MAY FILE A JURY DEMAND AND DEPOSIT JURY FEES. [THE COURT SIGNED THE PROPOSED ORDER SENT BY EMAIL.] JUDGE: HAROLD E. LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT WALGREEN (ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS WALGREEN) COMPANY'S MOTION TO STRIKE PUNITIVE DAMAGES ALLEGATIONS AGAINST WALGREEN CO. FROM THE COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF CYNTHIA KEARNEY DOES NOT OPPOSE THE MOTION PROVIDED THAT SHE IS NOT PRECLUDED FROM SEEKING TO LEAVE TO AMEND TO ADD A REQUEST FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES AGAINST WALGREEN CO. IF SHE HAS GOOD CAUSE TO DO SO. NOTHING IN THIS MOTION SEEKS SUCH A PRECLUSION ORDER. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: SHERRY L. SAWYER, CSR NO. 5976, EMAIL: SSAWYER@SFTC.ORG. (D302)

Unopposed Notice Of Motion For Leave To File Jury Demand And Deposit Jury Fees
Off Calendar Sep-07-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopted its tentative ruling on DEFENDANT KIMBERLY-CLARK CORPORATION's Unopposed Motion For Leave To File Jury Demand And Deposit Jury Fees as follows: Defendant Kimberly-Clark Corporation's motion for leave to file jury demand and deposit jury fees is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Per the relief requested in its moving papers, Kimberly-Clark may file a jury demand and deposit jury fees. [The Court signed the proposed order sent by email.] Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Nicole Rodich, CSR#11604, nrodich@sftc.org.

Off Calendar Dec-05-2016 Off Calendar

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-19-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT WALGREEN (ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS WALGREEN) COMPANY's MOTION TO STRIKE punitive damages allegations against Walgreen Co. from the complaint is GRANTED. Plaintiff Cynthia Kearney does not oppose the motion provided that she is not precluded from seeking to leave to amend to add a request for punitive damages against Walgreen Co. if she has good cause to do so. Nothing in this motion seeks such a preclusion order. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 =302/hk
